subject: [PATCH v2 11/21] nfsd: add fh_want_write() for early-verified SETATTR in nfsd_proc_setattr()

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds a call to fh_want_write() in the nfsd_proc_setattr() function, specifically after an early verification of the file handle using fh_verify(). This ensures that notify_change() is called with a mount write reference, which was previously skipped due to the early verification. The fix addresses a problem introduced by a previous patch that disabled a timestamp workaround for NFSv3+.
